reference: Hi, so I have had some weird things going on lately. I went to the gynecologist a few weeks ago and found out that a cyst ruptured and leaked fluid all over my abdomen. At least she said, 'It looks like a cyst ruptured,' but I have had cysts rupture before and it didn't hurt this time. So, that was a few weeks ago. However, about a week or so before that, I had a complete loss of appetite, and now it comes and goes. I have also had bloating and pain in my abdomen for months now. Last night, right after intercourse, I experienced a sharp pain in my lower abdomen, and I am really bloated, and it has not gone away at all. I am still in a lot of pain. Any idea what it could be? I have no fever or nausea, just bloating and severe pain.
text: Hi. So, I have had some weird things going on lately. I went to the gynecologist a few weeks ago and found out that a cyst ruptured and leaked fluid all over my abdomen. At least she said, "It looks like a cyst ruptured," but I have had cyst rupture before, and it didn't hurt this time. So, that was a few weeks ago. However, about a week or so before that, I had a complete loss of appetite, and now it comes and goes. I have also had bloating and pain in my abdomen for months now. Last night, right after intercourse, I experienced a sharp pain in my lower abdomen, and I am really bloated, and it has not gone away at all. I am still in a lot of pain. Any idea what it could be? I have no fever or nausea, just bloating and severe pain.
